title: Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences Vision & Mission
content:
Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences Vision & Mission

Vision

Our faculty aims to contribute to the national and international studies and generate knowledge, by resting on ethical values, and by having modern, critical perspective with taking science as its basic foundation.

Besides scientific studies in theory, with the application opportunities it offers, our faculty provides students with a scientific and practical education environment.

Mission

Our mission is to graduate students who have analytical and multidisciplinary point of view at universal level, who regard social values, embrace creative thinking and innovative approaches, evaluate daily events with a scientific perspective, interrogate and have the skill of problem solving.
